title: Miguel Fuentes-Cabrera Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Miguel Fuentes-Cabrera Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Miguel Fuentes-Cabrera
Khoury Faculty
PhD in Physics, University of La Laguna
Oakland Campus
After years as a scientist at the Oak Ridge National Laboratory, Miguel Fuentes-Cabrera realized that he enjoyed mentoring his students more than conducting his research. Now a professor at Northeastern’s Oakland campus, he wants to open opportunities for students to explore their curiosities, and his research experience has proven key in this effort.
The type of students that are here, they are very driven, [and] they are very entrepreneurial … I would love to see them in the future becoming professionals
Miguel Fuentes-Cabrera, Associate Teaching Professor
Explore all Khoury Stories
